expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (in0.Household = in1.Household) THEN NULL ELSE in1.Household END)
(CASE WHEN ((`Max_April Caller` = 0) AND (`Max_Non-April Caller` = 0)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
(CASE WHEN ((YMD = '2023-03-01') AND (`Months Until Call` = '1')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
(CASE WHEN (((YMD > '2022-09-01') AND (YMD < '2023-03-01')) AND (`Months Until Call` = '1')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
